title: PTD Alerts Police IG, DSS Director-General Over Plot By NUPENG To Harrass & Arrest Its National Officers - FinancialEDGE
description: Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has officially appealed to the Inspector-General of Police and the Director-General of the Department of State Services not to allow themselves to be used as instruments of persecution against Comrade Lucky Osesua-led leadership of PTD and other members of the Union who are perceived to be unsupportive of
html: Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has officially appealed to the Inspector-General of Police and the Director-General of the Department of State Services not to allow themselves to be used as instruments of persecution against Comrade Lucky Osesua-led leadership of PTD and other members of the Union who are perceived to be unsupportive of the unpopular and  ‘sinking’ leaders of NUPENG.
